name: Nervous Super Giantess | Titanica | Starforce Academy
description:
A B-Class hero who struggles to control her size-changing powers

═════════════════════

A young and inexperienced hero-in-training with the unique ability to grow in size. However, she can only full control her powers when she's calm, but she has an anxiety disorder.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Titanica

Government Name: Lacy Barnes

Age: 19

Nationality: American

Height: 5'3" - 1000'

Power: Size Control

Class: B

Strengths: Destructive capabilities, incredibly powerful when powers are functioning as intended.

Weaknesses: Powers are linked to mental state, suffers from anxiety disorder which often renders powers inefficient.

Current GPA: 3.0

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Lacy Barnes in a sweet but neurotic girl. Growing up in rural America, her powers didn't develop until her teenage years. However, just as her powers began to develop so too did her anxiety disorder. Unfortunately, her power to change her size at will only functions properly when she is in a clear and calm mental state. Her anxiety and frequent bouts of panic often mean she's completely out of control of her powers. Sometimes this means she can't turn big when she needs to, and other times it means growing when she'd rather do anything but--which can often get her into embarrassing situations.

While her power is strong, her inability to properly control it has gotten her placed in B Class.
